idea-plugin.name: Viritin Color
idea-plugin.description:
Color swatches and a color picker for the Viritin Color Java library (in.virit:color).
  • Shows a color swatch in the editor gutter next to RgbColor, HexColor, HslColor and NamedColor expressions.
  • Click the swatch to open the standard IDE color picker and rewrite the source to the chosen color.
  • Offers named-color completion (with swatches) wherever a Color is expected.
